chosen_action.title: Prefer repo proof asset over empty hold after exhausted StackOverflow rerun

why_this_action.summary: The active loop needed a truthful non-empty fallback after the post-cooldown StackOverflow slot was spent, but without letting a new proof-asset branch override real third-strike empty-board repair conditions.
supporting_reasons: The StackOverflow packet was already delivered and the post-cooldown rerun still produced no fresh placement-ready outcome.
Recent repo-conversion proof assets are suppressed, but when that suppression clears the selector should choose a concrete proof asset instead of another idle measurement hold.
The execution board still needs empty-board guard/repair precedence when it explicitly says no truthful do-now packet exists.
shared_findings_used: distribution_lane_latest.json: current lane logic is still dominated by distribution architecture guard handling
marketing_execution_board_latest.md: empty-board truth must keep repair precedence when no do-now packet exists

result.summary: Patched the selector to prefer repo proof assets after an exhausted StackOverflow rerun, added regression coverage for that branch, and preserved guarded empty-board escalation by explicitly checking the execution board before taking the proof-asset lane.
